channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Teaching American Songs in Kindergarten Matters
Haley Stevens' Unusual Video Surfaces as New Poll Shakes Michigan Senate Race
Rep. Jeffries to Vote Against Bill Halting Aid to Israel
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries announced he will oppose legislation that would end U.S. assistance to Israel.

item.title: Montana Democrat Poses as Blue-Collar Smokejumper but Lobbied for Far-Left Groups
item.description: Sam Forstag campaigns as a working-class candidate, yet records reveal his lobbying background supports progressive policies including transgender procedures.
